text.title: Ruff for Python and Biome for JS/TS as the Sole Linter+Formatter Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: remove-legacy
step.action: Remove black / flake8 / isort / pyupgrade / autoflake / pydocstyle configs + deps.

step.name: add-biome-config
step.action: Author biome.json; remove prettier+eslint where over-engineered.

step.name: wire-hooks-and-ci
step.action: Add ruff + biome hooks and CI jobs.
